platform_decisions.content: Serial batch event uploader with backpressure, exponential jitter, and server-supplied retry hints
Queue processor stratifies commands by type: slash/bash individual, non-slash batch-by-mode
Runtime stdout JSON guard diverts non-JSON lines to preserve NDJSON parser integrity
Cron jitter live-tuned via GrowthBook (60s refresh) with zod full-object validation
Permission rule shadowing detection with shared vs personal source-scoped sandbox exception
SDK-to-REPL message adapter with discriminated union for type-safe conversion
Per-tool result persistence threshold override via GrowthBook with declared-max fallback
Plugin version calculation with source-ordered priority and subdir path hashing
Iterative NFKC Unicode sanitization with property-class and explicit-range dual-method fallback
